title: osmanthus fragrans
intro: Osmanthus fragrans, also known as the fragrant osmanthus or tea olive, is an evergreen shrub native to China, renowned for its beautiful white or yellow flowers and fragrant leaves. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues such as fever, cough, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Osmanthus fragrans include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and boosting the immune system, among others. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Osmanthus fragrans are often used to make teas, infusions, and essential oils, which can be used to promote relaxation and well-being.
